parsed.fixed_xml: <ITEM>Bey Herrn Daniel Haag dem Buchbinder sind zu verkauffen: <BIBL><TITLE>Steiners Fest-Gedancken</TITLE> in <FORMAT>Fol.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>2. fl. 24. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Neues und vollkommenes Gebettbuch</TITLE> in <FORMAT>groß 8vo.</FORMAT> von <AUTHOR>Pfarrer Stehelin</AUTHOR> in <PLACE>St. Gallen</PLACE>, ohngebunden <PRIZE>46. kr.</PRIZE>; gebunden in Leder und Schlotz <PRIZE>fl. 1. 10. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Memoires de Rochester</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> ohngebunden <PRIZE>6. Batzen;</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Maupertuis</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Anfäng der Geographie</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>6. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Messung des Meridians Gradus</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>12. Batzen;</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Satura pars II.</TITLE> <FORMAT>8vo.</FORMAT> <PRIZE>18. kr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Gespräch von den Würmern welche bey Anfang dieses Jahrs auf dem Schnee gefunden worden</TITLE> <PRIZE>8. Rappen,</PRIZE> und viele andere mehr, davon der Bericht bey Ihme zu vernemmen.</BIBL></ITEM>
parsed.explanation: Corrected malformed XML structure and normalized faulty text encoding where it clearly resulted from character corruption. Fixes include: (1) closed the <BIBL> for 'Memoires de Rochester' before the next entry, (2) changed <PRICE>...</PRICE> to <PRIZE>...</PRIZE> for consistency, (3) removed stray corruption symbols (e.g., '√†'), (4) normalized corrupted format strings like '8v√≤' to '8vo.', (5) normalized 'gro√ü 8v√≤.' to 'groß 8vo.', (6) normalized corrupted words such as 'Anf√§ng' → 'Anfäng', (7) 'Gespr√§ch' → 'Gespräch', (8) 'W√ürmen' → 'Würmern', and (9) preserved original tagging semantics (<TITLE>, <AUTHOR>, <FORMAT>, <PLACE>, <PRIZE>) while ensuring all elements are properly nested and closed.
